title: Targa (TRGP) Stock Down 2% Since Q1 Earnings & Sales Miss
text: Targa Resources' (TRGP) share price dips after its first-quarter earnings and revenues lag the consensus mark.

title: Targa Resources' Capital Allocation Prowess Is Creating Value For Shareholders
text: Targa Resources reported strong first-quarter results on the financial and operational fronts. In recent months, management has proven superb at allocating capital for shareholders.

title: Targa Resources Corp. to Participate in Investor Conferences
text: HOUSTON, May 06, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) ("Targa" or the "Company") announced today that representatives from the Company will participate in investor meetings at the following investor conferences:
